meta.siteTitle: Bakeanaut — Edible Missions. Cleared for Launch.
meta.siteDescription: An experiential brand built around indulgent, dessert-forward missions. Order via WhatsApp from Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

headline: EDIBLE
MISSIONS.
CLEARED FOR
LAUNCH.
hero.subheadline: An experiential brand built around indulgent, dessert-forward missions.

cards.title: Not a bakery.
cards.description: A space program for your taste buds. Every recipe is a mission. Every launch is an event.

cards.title: Not products.
cards.description: Missions with codes, logs, and lore. Each item carries a story, a sector, and a purpose.

cards.title: Not customers.
cards.description: Crew members who earn badges and rank up. You don't just order — you enlist and become part of something bigger.

quote: Every offering exists for a reason.

reviews.name: Al Ameen Mohammed Hussain
reviews.text: Visited to get a butter cake for my wife's birthday, and the quality was beyond my expectations. The sweetness was perfectly balanced — not too sugary. You can feel the personal touch in their baking. Must try!

reviews.name: Mohammadyahya Mansuri
reviews.text: A must-visit for anyone who loves fresh, delicious pastries. From buttery croissants to decadent chocolate chip cookies, everything is made with care and high-quality ingredients. Their cakes are simply divine.

reviews.name: Sneha Saha
reviews.text: One stop destination for gorgeous looking and incredibly delicious cakes. Highly recommend these for every occasion!

reviews.name: Deepa
reviews.text: Treats have been consistently amazing! Fresh, flavorful, and incredibly tasty. A true delight! Definitely a must-try!

reviews.name: Sruthi R
reviews.text: The cakes over here are so awesome and freshly baked — super healthy too! Loved the taste!

reviews.name: Rachna Goel
reviews.text: Had jowar, oats brownie, modak and other delicacies. All are superb. No palm oil, no preservatives, no maida. Totally healthy and tasty options. Go for it without a second thought.

reviews.name: Sujitha Thangavelu
reviews.text: I have bought brownie from Bakeanaut. It was very tasty.

crewProgram.description: Every mission you complete earns you rank. Every rank unlocks new perks, classified drops, and crew-only access. This isn't a points program — it's a commitment.
crewProgram.quote: We remember every crew member by name. Your 10th order isn't just another order to us — it's a milestone we celebrate with you.
